description.en: Play this if you want massive damage spikes and speed.
Once per spotlight, when you succeed on a Spellcast attack, you can mark 1 Stress to add +2 to the damage total.

Once per scene, when you miss with a Spellcast attack during your spotlight, you can mark 1 Hit Point to make one immediate follow-up Spellcast melee attack against the same target. If it hits, add +3 to the damage total
Once per rest, when you succeed on a Spellcast attack, resolve its damage twice against the same target. **Mark 1 Stress.**

nce per long rest, when you hit with a Spellcast attack, you may **spend 2 Hope** to roll the damage twice and take the higher result. **Mark 1 Stress.** You may instead add +2d6 damage; if you do, mark 1 Stress and 1 Hit Point.
Play this if you want control, counters, and team setups.

Once per scene, when an adversary makes an attack against you or an ally in Close range, you can impose disadvantage on that attack or effect by spending 1 Stress. If the attack still hits, reduce incoming damage by 2.

When you succeed on a Spellcast Roll that grants a beneficial effect to an ally, you may **mark 1 Stress** to immediately repeat that effect on a different ally within Far range, once per triggering effect.

Once per long rest, after you succeed on a Spellcast Roll, choose one:

- **JustASecond:** Immediately take the spotlight again. Gain 1 Hope.

- **Friends With Benefits:** An ally in Close range immediately takes the spotlight to make one move or action, and they may reposition within Close as part of that action. They gain 1 Hope.

You cannot use Split Second during the extra turn.
